title: VMWare-LPE-2022-22960
description:
The query checks process command being placed into the script; CVE-2022-22960 allows a user to write to it and be executed as root.
This vulnerability of VMware Workspace ONE Access, Identity Manager and vRealize Automation contain a privilege escalation vulnerability due to improper permissions in support scripts.
CVE: CVE-2022-22960.
Read more here:.
https://www.cisa.gov/uscert/ncas/alerts/aa22-138b
https://www.vmware.com/security/advisories/VMSA-2022-0011.html
Tags: #exploit #CVE-2022-22960
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events') and (('Command Line' like '*/opt/vmware/certproxy/bing/certproxyService.sh*' or 'Command Line' like '*/horizon/scripts/exportCustomGroupUsers.sh*' or 'Command Line' like '*/horizon/scripts/extractUserIdFromDatabase.sh*') or ('Process Name' like '*certproxyService.sh*' or 'Process Name' like '*exportCustomGroupUsers.sh*' or 'Process Name' like '*extractUserIdFromDatabase.sh *')) | fields Time, 'Host Name (Server)', 'Process Name', 'Command Line', 'Command Line'

ask_ai_prompts: Summarize the Microsoft Sentinel converted detection results and identify the highest-risk pivots.
